sousTitre: The first sign of the Zodiac
introduction: Aries is the first sign of the Zodiac. It begins with the spring equinox, between roughly March 21 and April 20, at the very moment when nature surges back to life, when light gains ground over darkness, when everything starts anew. It is no coincidence that astrology places the starting point of the cycle here: Aries embodies birth, the first impulse, the gesture that says “I exist.”

fondationsCosmiques.texte: Aries belongs to the Fire element (hot and dry), which gives it a choleric temperament: energy, will, creative or destructive action. It is the first level of Fire — that of instinct, of the primal impulse, of an enthusiasm that burns out quickly but sets ablaze everything in its path. Its mode is cardinal: it inaugurates a season. Cardinal signs are initiators, triggers. Where Taurus stabilises and Gemini scatters, Aries starts things off. It is the pioneer par excellence.
fondationsCosmiques.courteAscension: An Aries Ascendant rises quickly on the horizon — it is known as a sign of “short ascension” — which means that, statistically, fewer people have Aries as their Ascendant.
fondationsCosmiques.pluton: Since the discovery of Pluto, some astrologers have suggested assigning Aries to it as a domicile rather than Scorpio, in order to preserve the Uranus–Neptune–Pluto sequence within the Zodiac. The question remains open and cannot be settled by figures alone.

analogies.objet: The spark, the blade, the tool that opens a passage
analogies.fonction: To initiate, to pierce, to assert
analogies.texte: Aries is the beginning of all things. Initiative. Progress. Swift — often hasty — action. The spirit of adventure, the desire to discover, the explorer's drive. It is the pioneer, the guide, the natural leader. Just as the ram leads the flock, the native of this sign will always seek to place themselves out front, never to be lost in the crowd.

mythologie.texte: Aries is linked to the myth of the Golden Fleece. Jason, the archetypal Aries hero — dynamic, fearless, brave, a conqueror even in his tumultuous loves — sets out to win a treasure that is never given but must be earned. The superhuman trials imposed on the hero turn his journey into a true initiatory path, full of twists, abandoned projects and pioneering enthusiasm.
mythologie.civilisations: Among the ancient Egyptians, the ram was the emblem of Amun, god of fertility and air. In Vedic Indian civilisation, it is akin to Agni, the god of fire. The ram as a virile and fertilising symbol runs through many civilisations, carrying everywhere the same charge: that of a primal, founding energy that sets the world in motion.

portrait.temperament: Aries acts before theorising. It needs to confront reality in order to know. Its character is frank, wholehearted, often spontaneous, with little taste for detours. It prefers momentum and simplicity of action to overly long analysis or soft compromises. The mind is quick, active, carried by fast understanding and great capacity for work. The imagination can be effervescent. When immature, it may confuse strength with haste. As it matures, it becomes a lucid initiator, able to channel its inner fire in the service of a clear vision.
forces: Taking the initiative without waiting for general approval
Mobilising energy at the launch of a project
Acting with courage when the situation demands it
ombres: Immediate reaction instead of a considered response
Needless conflict when energy is not channelled
Vehement outbursts that can dictate irreparable acts
besoinsVitaux: Being able to express their will without constantly justifying it
aTravailler: Patience and a sense of timing
Constancy: finishing what has been started
The ability to choose their battles
portrait.equilibre: An Aries in full command of their powers becomes brave without being aggressive, assertive without crushing, able to inspire others without bullying them. Their frankness becomes clear rather than brutal, and their fire becomes a creative, lasting, mastered force.

sante.texte: Aries governs the head, the face, the brain, the eyes and the organs located there. It predisposes to migraines, toothaches, eye and ear disorders, and sometimes cerebral congestion. Fevers of various origins are frequent, but the Aries native can withstand very high temperatures without suffering unduly. The constitution is generally robust, but there is a risk of wear from excessive effort or recklessness.

maisons.texte: The most natural position. The energy of Aries expresses itself here in its full power: a quick mind, fast understanding, ardour, courage, combativeness. Self-confidence drives boldness, sometimes recklessness. Ambition is marked, the will powerful — but it shows more in intensity than in duration. The native always displays great independence. Activity is rapid and fiery. Realisation follows conception at once, but is often compromised by haste.

Broad potential for earnings thanks to considerable activity, but impulsive spending and lack of foresight keep finances unstable, at least until maturity. An independent career is preferable. In case of setbacks, Aries knows how to overcome discouragement and right the ship through energetic measures. Gambling and speculation should be avoided.

A very curious mind, hardworking but critical, even caustic — an excellent position for a polemicist. An attraction to travel and high speeds, hence a risk of accidents. Family relationships are often disturbed by violent arguments and fallings-out, usually short-lived.

The father is often very authoritarian and the family poorly united. Possibility of accidents, premature bereavements, fires or calamities affecting family real-estate holdings. The end of life can be eventful, but the subject generally overcomes difficulties thanks to the overall configuration of the chart.

A tendency toward romantic recklessness, numerous adventures, passionate whims and possible jealousy. Financial losses tied to risky speculation are significant. A position not very favourable to having children, or else they are turbulent and hard to raise.

A heightened predisposition to the sign's ailments: frequent migraines, eye, dental or ear disorders, fevers and inflammations. Collaborators show too much independence, leading to frequent changes. The native sometimes struggles to keep a job because of their impulsiveness.

Often an early marriage, decided on impulse or at first sight, but a turbulent married life with serious arguments. The partner is authoritarian and impulsive. Business partnerships are rarely favourable. Declared enemies act openly, which paradoxically makes them less dangerous.

Foretells an end that may come rather abruptly. Hardly favours inheritances, or indicates their squandering. However, Aries here also carries the capacity to be reborn after trials, to regenerate with considerable strength.

Purely spiritual tendencies are rather weak, but if the subject takes an interest in religion or philosophy, it will be in an active sense: missionary, propagandist, activist. A strong attraction to long journeys and exploration, but a tendency to accidents linked to reckless acts.

An eventful destiny with several changes of career or residence. Success thanks to the spirit of initiative. The native is often called to prominent positions, or seeks an independent situation. A sign fairly favourable to fame. The subject's mother is often an authoritarian and energetic woman.

Friends who need no prompting to lend a hand, but who are not thrifty. This sign can ensure powerful connections in the army, the judiciary or heavy industry. Friends are impulsive, hence frequent arguments and fallings-out, but rarely final.

A predisposition to Aries ailments that may become chronic. Hidden enemies are few — Aries pointing rather to open adversaries — and there is little mystery in the subject's life. Initiatives are often compromised by unexpected difficulties.

amour.texte: Aries loves with spontaneity, intensity and frankness. It needs to feel that something is happening: a surge of energy, a vivid attraction, movement. It prefers a clear, lively, embodied relationship to one that is too cautious or too slow.
qualites: Loves openly and quickly shows interest
Brings warmth, vitality and intensity to the bond
Can be brave in love when they truly care about someone
vigilances: May grow weary if the relationship becomes too passive
Sometimes reacts too quickly in the heat of emotion
Tolerates prolonged unspoken issues or relationship games poorly

travail.texte: Aries works the way it lives: it needs action, room to manoeuvre, a clear goal and a sense of immediate usefulness. It excels in phases of launching, conquest, decision-making or crisis.
atouts: Responsive and able to launch a project quickly
At ease when it is time to decide or open a way
defis: Risks being too blunt with professional colleagues

argent.texte: Aries sees money as a means to act, to move forward, to gain autonomy. It seeks less to possess than to be able to move quickly and freely toward what it wants to do.
forces: Knows how to invest energy to earn
Likes to feel it has the means to act
risques: A taste for risk without sufficient assessment

planetes.description: The Sun in Aries asserts a pioneering, willful and direct identity. It needs to act in order to feel alive.
The Moon in Aries lives fast, reacts fast and needs emotional autonomy. Emotion rises quickly and often subsides just as fast.
Mercury in Aries thinks fast, speaks fast and decides fast. The mind goes straight to the central point.
Venus in Aries loves with drive, desire, spontaneity and a taste for conquest. Pleasure comes through the liveliness of the bond.
Mars in Aries is in one of its most natural expressions: frank, offensive, direct, instinctive action.
Jupiter in Aries amplifies momentum, faith in action and the confidence to move forward.
Saturn in Aries calls for learning to master one's momentum. It does not block the fire, but compels it to become more measured.
Uranus in Aries produces an impulse to break free, a will to liberate oneself quickly and shatter inertia.
manifestations: Ability to spark a fresh start

planetes.description: Neptune in Aries seeks an ideal to live out through action. Inspiration comes through commitment, fire, movement.
Pluto in Aries deeply transforms one's relationship to will, struggle and personal power.
manifestations: Ability to be reborn after shocks

compatibilites.texte: Two Aries can understand each other very quickly, spur each other on strongly and move forward without hesitation. The relationship is lively, direct, passionate, but also potentially explosive if each wants to lead alone.
Aries wants to move fast, Taurus wants to build slowly. The bond can be complementary, but the rhythms are very different.
Aries loves momentum, Gemini loves movement. The duo can be fast, lively, stimulating and mobile.
Aries can clash with what Cancer feels deeply. The relationship requires tact, emotional security and respect for emotional rhythms.
Aries and Leo share momentum, warmth and frankness. Together, they can energise each other very strongly.
Aries wants to act fast; Virgo wants to understand, correct and organise. One pushes, the other adjusts.
Aries asserts the self, Libra recalls the other. It is a very strong axis of complementarity, attraction and relational learning.
frictions: Aries wants to go straight ahead

compatibilites.texte: Aries acts in broad daylight, Scorpio acts in depth. The relationship is strong, magnetic, sometimes conflictual, but never lukewarm.
Aries provides the momentum, Sagittarius provides the vision. Together, they can go fast and far.
Aries wants to move fast, Capricorn wants to build over time. The relationship can be highly productive or highly conflictual.
Aries acts, Aquarius thinks differently. The bond can be very stimulating if each respects the other's independence.
Aries acts clearly, Pisces feels broadly. The bond can be inspiring or disconcerting depending on the ability to understand each other.

ascendant.texte: If your Ascendant is Aries, you enter life with frankness, speed and a need for initiative. Even if your Sun is in another sign, your spontaneous way of acting, presenting yourself and reacting carries an Aries tone.
apparence: An impression of movement and vigour
temperament: Enters situations in a direct way
vigilances: A tendency to go too fast

etoilesFixes.texte: An energy of directness, courage and impact. It reinforces the idea of a thrust that wants to exist and push forward.
A nervous, fast, enterprising tone. It heightens initiative and immediate reaction, while recalling the importance of channelling the fire.

geographie.texte: Power of initiative, assertive will and active momentum.
Impulse, assertion, centrality of the collective self.
Strength, momentum, a structure of will and active power.

figuresCelebres.texte: Boldness, strength of presence and the ability to impose a strongly asserted identity.
Lively energy, a combative temperament and a direct presence.
Frankness, commitment and clarity in taking a stand.
Instinctive power, raw presence and embodied intensity.

faq.question: What is the character of Aries?
faq.reponse: Aries is characterised by frankness, courage, initiative and energy. It is a direct, wholehearted temperament that needs to act in order to feel alive. It can be impatient and impulsive, but it is also one of the bravest and most generous signs of the Zodiac.

faq.question: What kind of lover is Aries?
faq.reponse: Passionate, spontaneous, direct. Aries takes the initiative, quickly shows interest and brings intensity and warmth to the relationship. It needs a lively, frank relationship and tolerates passivity or unspoken issues poorly.

faq.question: What kind of worker is Aries?
faq.reponse: A launcher, a starter, a decision-maker. Aries excels in phases of creation, conquest and crisis. It needs autonomy and a clear goal. It is less comfortable in routine or overly hierarchical environments.

faq.question: Which house corresponds to Aries?
faq.reponse: The First House — that of identity, temperament, and the way one enters life. Its natural analogy with Aries underscores a dynamic of departure, assertion and immediate presence.

faq.question: What is the ideal Ascendant for Aries?
faq.reponse: A Libra Ascendant brings diplomacy and perspective to Aries. A Leo Ascendant reinforces its charisma. A Sagittarius Ascendant amplifies its need for adventure and independence.

faq.question: What are the flaws of Aries?
faq.reponse: Impatience, impulsiveness, quick anger and a lack of listening are its shadow zones. It may act without thinking, be abrupt with those around it, and confuse strength with haste.

faq.question: Is Aries compatible with Scorpio?
faq.reponse: The bond is intense and magnetic, ruled by Mars. The attraction is strong, but power struggles are frequent. Shared loyalty and courage can weld this powerful duo together.
